title: History essay paragraph
text: By 1969, the moon landing had captured the imagination of the entire world. Nearly 600 million people watched live on television. The mission demonstrated what was possible when nations invested in long-term, ambitious goals.

tips.target: By 1969, the moon landing had captured the imagination of the entire world. Nearly 600 million people
watched live on television. The mission demonstrated what was possible when nations invested in long-term, ambitious goals.

character_tips.anna: History essay format. Dates and narrative in flow.
character_tips.maxim: History writing = storytelling with anchors. Train it.
character_tips.klavochka: Stories of the past, my dear 📜
